All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbsoluteCommand
Command wrapper that can run normally or with an optional timeout.
AbsoluteSubsystem
Extends SubsystemBase to provide logging capabilities and more helper methods.
AbsoluteSubsystem.LoggingBackend
 
AddressableLEDBufferView
Represents a view into a portion of an AddressableLEDBuffer.
Arm
Multi-DOF Arm subsystem: per-joint modes (IDLE, MANUAL, POSITION, HOLDING) with IK support
Arm.Joint
 
Arm.Joint.Mode
 
Arm.Joint.OutputFilter
 
Arm.JointConfig
 
Arm.JointConfig.Builder
 
ArmSimulation
 
ArmSimulation.Config
 
ArmSimulation.JointSimConfig
 
DoubleUtils
Utility methods for working with doubles in typical robotics control scenarios.
Elevator
Elevator helper with manual, position, and holding modes.
Elevator.ElevatorConfig
All units are meters, meters/sec, or meters/sec^2 unless noted.
Elevator.ElevatorConfig.Builder
Fluent builder for Elevator.ElevatorConfig.
Elevator.Mode
Operating mode for the elevator.
Elevator.OutputFilter
Contract for modifying the computed output based on additional context (e.g., sensors).
EncoderConversion
 
EncoderWrapper
EncoderWrapper provides a minimal, vendor-agnostic interface for fetching and setting linear position (in meters).
EncoderWrapper.CANCoderImpl
Simple CANCoder implementation performing unit conversions to meters.
EncoderWrapper.DioEncoderImpl
WPILib DIO encoder implementation with offset for setPositionMeters.
EncoderWrapper.DutyCycleEncoderImpl
WPILib DutyCycleEncoder absolute implementation with offset for setPositionMeters.
EncoderWrapper.GenericAbsoluteRotationsImpl
Generic absolute rotations-based implementation (sensor rotations in [0,1)).
EncoderWrapper.GenericCountsImpl
Generic counts-based implementation.
EncoderWrapper.GenericMechanismRotationsImpl
Generic mechanism-rotations implementation.
EncoderWrapper.TalonFXIntegratedImpl
TalonFX integrated sensor implementation.
EndEffector
Endeffector subsystem base class.
EndEffector.Config
 
JoystickHelper
Utility class for processing joystick inputs with various deadzone and scaling algorithms.
LEDConstants
 
LEDPattern
 
Leds
 
Leds.LEDOperation
Functional interface for custom LED operations
LoggedTunableNumber
Class for a tunable number.
MotoredSubsystem
 
MotorWrapper
Unified motor controller wrapper, Doesnt matter the vendor.
MotorWrapper.MotorConfig
 
MotorWrapper.MotorType
 
MotorWrapper.UnifiedMotorConfig
Builder-style unified motor configuration supporting common options and optional motion parameters.
musicPlayer
musicPlayer class to manage an Orchestra of TalonFX motors to play music files.
OnTheFlyPathing
 
OnTheFlyPathing.PathFactory<P,W,C,G>
Factory interface that adapts a concrete path library.
Patterns
 
Pivot
 
Pivot.Config
 
PivotSimulation
 
PivotSimulation.Config
Configuration for pivot simulation physics
POVToJoystick
A Trigger whose state is based on a POV (D-pad) angle from a GenericHID.
RazerWrapper
 
RazerWrapper.RazerMapping
 
Simulation
 
SimulationBase
Base class for subsystem simulations with automatic AdvantageKit logging.
SimulationBase.SimState
Simulation state container for a single mechanism
Utils
 
Vector2
Represents a 2D vector with x and y components.
Vector3
Represents a 3D vector with x, y, and z components.
Vision
Photon Vision, Not coded yet dont use.
XBoxWrapper
Wrapper class for Xbox controller functionality in FRC.
XBoxWrapper.XBoxMapping
Static mapping of Xbox controller button IDs.
